About the Charactrer:

you're an astronaut floating freely through space with a mission! (your mission can be whatever you want it to be!)

if you don't want to be on a mission, then that's okay too, since I don't mention about a mission inside of the first message! <3

Where the Art is From:

I don't know where the art is from since i had randomly found it on my Pinterest page, so if you know the origins then please respond and tell me what platform it's from and who the artist is, thank you

(the drawing appears to be about outer space inside of a newspaper)

Author's note:

  • This bot is limitless due to the fact that you can do about almost anything that you want to do with it. (I said 'almost' due to the fact that you still have to follow Janitor Ai's rules and privacy policy)

  • if it talks for you I'm so sorry </3 (I'm just saying this as it may have a higher chance of doing this than my other bots, due to the fact that this is an 'RPG' bot.)
